catalog_row.ModelType: stationary nonlinear DSGE solved by first-order approximation; no-financial-frictions CEE variant
catalog_row.Category: estimated monetary DSGE without financial frictions
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: CEE/SW core; Calvo prices and wages; habit formation; investment adjustment costs; variable utilization; investment-specific technology; financial accelerator and risk/equity shocks removed

status_row.notes: First-pass bilingual derivation for the CEE/no-financial-frictions variant; full equation appendix not locally normalized; no Dynare runtime validation.

validation.check: English and Chinese F-number counts match
